retry_reason: Not a wrapper — failure modes are timer-related (BUG_ON on mod_timer) or no-op rearm path; refcount_inc is unconditional on the path where it executes, so no retry semantics apply.

judge.reason: The function's primary purpose is scheduling a timewait socket timer (mod_timer/mod_timer_pending) with timeout calculations and statistics updates; the refcount_inc call is a conditional side effect to pin the tw_dr structure while the timer is armed, not the main purpose.
